title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at L&T Finance Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at L&T Finance Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, L&T Finance Capital India in Ghaziabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About L&T Finance Capital India:
L&T Finance Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Finance Capital India!
